summary: Tested new Community Health Q&A backend endpoints + frontend UI on Mental Journal page, plus liveliness touches on landing. Added 12 new health test cases to backend_test.py (total 33 tests, all passing). Frontend flows verified end-to-end: post (anonymous), comment, count update, smoke-tested water module to confirm no regressions.

issues: The animated typewriter SVG uses class='typewriter-svg' but has no data-testid='typewriter-svg' attribute. Element exists and renders correctly; consider adding the testid for stable automation per the review checklist.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid='typewriter-svg' to the animated typewriter SVG on Landing.jsx for testability parity with other elements.

(Optional) The /api/health/posts/{post_id}/comments DELETE endpoint silently returns {ok:true} even when comment_id does not exist or belongs to another user (no 404). Consider returning 404 to mirror health-post delete semantics.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L618-623: DELETE health comment never raises 404 — a non-owner or non-existent comment id silently returns ok:true with no decrement. Low risk (UI doesn't expose IDs across users) but inconsistent with delete_health_post behavior.

HealthHelp.jsx: load(), submit(), toggle() catch errors silently (empty catch{}). Network failures will leave UI in stale state without user feedback. The submit() catch does show a toast; load()/toggle() do not.

HealthHelp.jsx L127: delete button is only rendered when p.user_id === user.user_id, but useAuth().user may be undefined briefly on first render — that's fine but means anonymous-author UI shows no indicator that the current user authored an anonymous post (still expected since we hide identity).
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_bissal_token (user 'Test Bissal', user_id=test-user-bissal). Second user seeded for cross-user tests: Bearer test_session_bissal_token_2 (user 'Test Two', user_id=test-user-bissal-2). Both also work as session_token cookie.
seed_data_creation: Inserted a second user/session (test-user-bissal-2 / test_session_bissal_token_2) in test_database for cross-user 404 tests. All TEST_ prefixed health posts/comments cleaned up by their own tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Health Q&A: POST/GET/DELETE /api/health/posts and /comments are stable. Anonymous flag correctly maps author_name to 'Anonymous'. comments_count increments on POST comment and decrements on DELETE comment; cascade-delete clears comments on post delete. Frontend testids: health-form, health-title, health-body, health-anon, health-submit, health-list, health-post-<id>, health-toggle-<id>, health-delete-<id>, health-comments-<id>, health-comment-input-<id>, health-comment-anon-<id>, health-comment-submit-<id>, health-comment-<id>. Landing testids verified: ticker, cta-health, pull-quote, marker-underline (class). Typewriter SVG lacks data-testid but exists as svg.typewriter-svg.
